name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Superb Cash Advance Cincinnati, Ohio — Superb Cash Advance offers payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit loans up to $5,000 with same-day approval ...
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance operates a physical location at 1919 Metropolitan Parkway SW in Atlanta, Georgia, and provides online lending services. The company specializes in short-term emergency cash solutions designed for consumers who need rapid access to funds. Their service hours are Monday-Friday 8:30am-8:30pm and Saturday-Sunday 9:30am-6:30pm, making them accessible during extended business hours.

The company offers multiple loan products including payday loans (up to $1,000), cash advances (up to $1,000), bad credit loans (up to $50,000), same-day loans, and personal loans. All products are marketed as unsecured loans available to borrowers of all credit types, with minimal documentation required. They advertise online application processes and same-day or quick funding approval, targeting consumers in financial emergencies who may lack traditional credit access.

Superb Cash Advance emphasizes accessibility and ease of application, with customer reviews highlighting friendly staff (specifically mentioning an employee named Helen), straightforward processes, and lack of extensive credit checks. Reviews also note their willingness to work with borrowers on flexible payment schedules and installment options. The company positions itself as a solution for those with bad credit or urgent financial needs who want to avoid traditional credit inquiries.

Customer reviews are overwhelmingly positive (4.0 rating), though some reviews reference locations outside Atlanta (Arvada), suggesting multi-location operations. However, specific pricing, APR rates, fees, and loan terms are not disclosed on the website. The lack of transparent fee and rate information, combined with the short-term nature of payday and cash advance products, indicates this serves primarily as a high-cost emergency lending option. No information is provided about credit-building features, financial counseling, or debt management services.
address: 2898 Short Vine St Unit M, Cincinnati, OH 45219

company_info.headquarters: 2898 Short Vine St Unit M, Cincinnati, OH 45219

pros: Same-day approval and funding available for emergency cash needs
Accepts all credit types without requiring hard credit checks
Loan amounts up to $5,000 for online applications and up to $50,000 for bad credit loans
Flexible payment schedules and installment options available
Minimal documentation required for quick approval process
Both in-person and online application options
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fees disclosed on website — suggests high-cost lending typical of payday loans
Short-term loan structure may trap borrowers in debt cycles without clear repayment terms
Customer reviews reference Arvada locations but address shown is Atlanta, creating location clarity issues
No mention of credit-building features, financial counseling, or debt management support
Limited transparency about loan terms and total cost of borrowing
best_for: Consumers facing immediate financial emergencies needing $1,000 or less
Borrowers with poor or no credit history unable to access traditional bank loans
Individuals seeking same-day or next-day cash access without extensive application processes
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best for consumers facing genuine short-term financial emergencies who need immediate access to small amounts of cash ($1,000 or less) and cannot access traditional bank loans due to poor credit. However, the lack of disclosed rates, terms, and fees — combined with payday loan products — indicates this is a high-cost short-term lending solution that should only be used as a last resort, as repayment cycles can perpetuate debt rather than solve underlying financial issues.
services: Installment loans with flexible payment schedules
In-person cash advance services at Atlanta location
